name: GitHub Members Without MFA
description: Detects active GitHub organization members that do not have MFA enabled
query: SELECT id, login, email, role, org_membership_state FROM github_organization_members WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(org_membership_state, '')) = 'active' AND two_factor_enabled = false
remediation: Require MFA for all active GitHub organization members and remove access for users who cannot enroll.
